ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* A measure of how acoustic the track is */,
  "danceability" REAL /* A measure of how suitable a track is for dancing */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* A measure of the intensity and activity in the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the track contains explicit lyrics */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* A measure of the likelihood the track is instrumental */,
  "key" INTEGER /* The key the track is in */,
  "liveness" REAL /* A measure of how often the track is performed live */,
  "loudness" REAL /* The loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* The modality of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* A measure of the presence of spoken words in the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* The overall tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "valence" REAL /* A measure of the musical positiveness of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the track was released */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album to which the track belongs */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "explicit_lyrics" TEXT /* Detailed information about explicit content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the track's metadata */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_urls" TEXT /* URLs to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the artist's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who produced the album */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the album's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting (public, private, collaborative) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the playlist's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the playlist track entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "total_listening_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent listening to music */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was listened to */,
  "listening_date" TEXT /* Date the track was listened to */,
  "listening_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the listening session in milliseconds */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for listening (e.g., mobile, desktop, smart speaker) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the user listened to the track */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the listening history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
